description: Retrofit the legacy 'INSURANCE_POLICIES' table to support soft deletion while maintaining application compatibility. The implementation requires renaming the table to 'INSURANCE_POLICIES_BASE' and adding audit columns: IS_ACTIVE (VARCHAR2(1), default 'Y', NOT NULL), DELETED_AT (DATE), and DELETED_BY (VARCHAR2(50)). A view named 'INSURANCE_POLICIES' must be created to expose the original table structure for active records (IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'). An INSTEAD OF DELETE trigger on this view should intercept deletion attempts and instead update the base table to set IS_ACTIVE to 'N', DELETED_AT to SYSDATE, and DELETED_BY to the current user. Verify the system by deleting Policy ID 1005 ('Dr. Arlene Stanton') through the view. Connection: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Database=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123
